text: {"claims":[{"statement":"Communication messages that highlight the low risk of side effects and high efficacy of the vaccines will address concerns and promote vaccine acceptance.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Communication messages that highlight the low risk of side effects, and high efficacy of the vaccines, will therefore address these concerns and promote vaccine acceptance.","entailment":"The quoted sentence directly states that such messages will address concerns and promote acceptance, supporting the claim.","population":"","intervention":"communication messages highlighting low risk of side effects and high efficacy","comparator":"","outcome":"address concerns and promote vaccine acceptance","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"causal"},{"statement":"Recent evidence from ten LMICs, including Nigeria, supports the assertion that highlighting low risk and high efficacy promotes acceptance.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Recent evidence from ten LMICs, including Nigeria, support this assertion [47].","entailment":"The quote indicates that evidence from multiple countries backs the claim that such communication promotes acceptance.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"supports the assertion","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"associational"},{"statement":"Respondents who considered a hypothetical vaccine with a 5% probability of side effects and 75% efficacy reported an acceptance rate of 67% or higher.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"The study shows that respondents who were asked to consider a hypothetical vaccine with a 5% probability of side effects and 75% efficacy reported an acceptance rate of 67% or higher [47].","entailment":"The quoted result provides the observed acceptance rate for the described hypothetical vaccine, directly supporting the claim.","population":"respondents","intervention":"hypothetical vaccine with 5% probability of side effects and 75% efficacy","comparator":"","outcome":"acceptance rate of 67% or higher","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"5% probability of side effects; 75% efficacy; acceptance rate ≥67%","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Current communication plans such as zonal town hall meetings, press briefings, text messages, social media posts, short videos, and voice notes aim to educate the public and encourage COVID-19 vaccine uptake as vaccines are rolled out.","claimType":"methodological","quote":"Finally, the current communication plans such as zonal town hall meetings, press briefings, text messages, social media posts, short videos, and voice notes aim to educate the public and encourage COVID-19 vaccine uptake as vaccines are rolled out.","entailment":"The sentence explicitly lists the communication methods and their intended aim, supporting the claim about their purpose.","population":"","intervention":"zonal town hall meetings, press briefings, text messages, social media posts, short videos, voice notes","comparator":"","outcome":"educate public and encourage vaccine uptake","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"The strategy has had only a modest effect on the desired behavioral change.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"But, the strategy has had only a modest effect on the desired behavioral change [48].","entailment":"The quoted assessment directly states the limited impact of the strategy on behavior, supporting the claim.","population":"","intervention":"the strategy (communication plans)","comparator":"","outcome":"modest effect on desired behavioral change","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"The study methodology relies on a small sample size to elicit COVID-19 vaccine misinformation, conspiracy theories, perceptions, and intentions about the vaccine.","claimType":"methodological","quote":"Our study methodology relies on a small sample size to elicit COVID-19 vaccine misinformation and conspiracies theories, perceptions, and intentions about the COVID-19 vaccine.","entailment":"The sentence describes the methodological reliance on a small sample to gather various vaccine-related attitudes, supporting the claim.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"small sample size","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"The findings are not generalizable and are unique to regions and populations with similar contexts as Nigeria.","claimType":"methodological","quote":"Thus, the findings are not generalizable; instead, they are unique to regions and populations with similar contexts as Nigeria.","entailment":"The quoted statement directly declares the lack of generalizability and specificity to similar contexts, supporting the claim.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Misinformation and conspiracy theories about COVID‑19 vaccination are evident globally.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Misinformation and conspiracy theories about COVID‑1 vaccination are evident globally.","entailment":"The sentence asserts the global presence of misinformation and conspiracy theories, supporting the claim.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Distrust in the government and suspicion of global actors’ motives regarding the vaccine’s effectiveness and safety is strongly associated with hesitancy.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Distrust in the government regarding the pandemic response and suspicion of global actors’ motives regarding the vaccine, especially its effectiveness and safety, is strongly associated with hesitancy.","entailment":"The quoted phrase directly links distrust and suspicion to vaccine hesitancy, supporting the claim.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"hesitancy","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"associational"},{"statement":"Adaptive strategies and messages are needed in the face of vaccine hesitancy.","claimType":"value","quote":"Thus, adaptive strategies and messages are needed in the face of vaccine hesitancy.","entailment":"The sentence explicitly states the necessity of adaptive strategies when hesitancy is present, supporting the claim.","population":"","intervention":"adaptive strategies and messages","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"normative"},{"statement":"Targeted awareness campaigns and messages delivering transparent information about COVID-19 vaccine safety, efficacy, and development process are needed to encourage vaccine acceptance.","claimType":"value","quote":"Targeted awareness campaigns and messages that deliver transparent information about COVID-19 vaccine safety and efficacy and the development process are also needed to encourage vaccine acceptance.","entailment":"The quoted sentence directly calls for such campaigns to promote acceptance, supporting the claim.","population":"","intervention":"targeted awareness campaigns and messages delivering transparent information about safety, efficacy, and development process","comparator":"","outcome":"encourage vaccine acceptance","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"normative"}]}
